__comment: Shared parity fixture for the physical-directional-class guard. Consumed by BOTH web/src/eslint/noRestrictedSyntax.test.ts (directionalClassPattern) and web/src/locales/test_audit_i18n.py (PHYSICAL_CLASS_RE). Every probe is asserted against both regexes, so the two implementations cannot drift apart silently: extending one pattern without the other fails the other side's suite. Add a probe here whenever either pattern changes.
